title: Clean energy projects map
body: "The government’s clean energy mission is to deliver clean power by 2030 and accelerate progress towards net zero.  This map shows clean energy projects supported by the UK government. This includes projects being supported by the National Wealth Fund and Great British Energy.  The map gives information on the investment and jobs generated by the featured projects and technologies.  Featured projects  The map features a range of projects supported by government since July 2024.  The supporting documents provide more detail on the methodology and the sources of data.  More projects will be added as they’re announced.   Projects funded by the Northern Ireland Executive are not included on the map. This data may be added in the future.   Feedback  This is a new tool. Help us improve it and give your feedback by email. "
